creator: adagio@weifler.in-berlin.de
text:
cannot provide environment, since it is a service of the freebsd infrastructure. 

Ingwer:~ adagio$ ping torrents.freebsd.org
PING torrents.freebsd.org (69.147.83.59): 56 data bytes
^C
--- torrents.freebsd.org ping statistics ---
8 packets transmitted, 0 packets received, 100% packet loss

Ingwer:~ adagio$ telnet torrents.freebsd.org 80
Trying 2001:4f8:fff6::3b...
telnet: connect to address 2001:4f8:fff6::3b: Operation timed out
Trying 69.147.83.59...
telnet: connect to address 69.147.83.59: Operation timed out
telnet: Unable to connect to remote host

Ingwer:~ adagio$ telnet torrents.freebsd.org 8080
Trying 2001:4f8:fff6::3b...
telnet: connect to address 2001:4f8:fff6::3b: Host is down
Trying 69.147.83.59...

..dead

Fix: 

could possibly arrange to provide a KVM Virtual Machine at a Berlin (Germany) Location near BCIX/ECIX provider-exchanges (1 Hop). 
If it would help send me the location of a VM-Image.
How-To-Repeat: see above
